provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Nuclear Weapons (Prohibition) Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Application of Treaty
provisions.content:
3. Application of Treaty
The Non-Proliferation of Nuclear Weapons Treaty of 1st July, 1968 as set out in the Schedule to this Act and any amendments thereto, shall have force of law in Botswana.

provisions.title: Act binds the State
provisions.content:
4. Act binds the State
This Act binds the State.

provisions.title: Nuclear weapons and nuclear materials

definitions.definition: any form of energy released in the course of nuclear fission or nuclear fusion or of any other nuclear transmutation
any nuclear weapons or other explosive device capable of releasing nuclear energy, irrespective of the purpose for which it could be used, whether assembled, partly assembled, or unassembled

the act of providing funds or financial services which are used, in whole or in part, for the manufacture, acquisition, possession, development, export, transhipment, brokering, transport, transfer, stockpiling or use of any nuclear weapon and its means of delivery and related materials, including both technologies and goods used for non-legitimate purposes
the Non-Proliferation of Nuclear Weapons Treaty of 1st July, 1968 as set out in the Schedule to this Act and includes any amendments thereto and any Resolutions of the Conference of Parties.
